original_query: select l_orderkey, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue, o_orderdate, o_shippriority from customer, orders, lineitem where c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' and c_custkey = o_custkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_orderdate < date '1995-03-20' and l_shipdate > date '1995-03-20' group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority order by revenue desc, o_orderdate limit 10;
rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        l_orderkey, 
        SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue 
    FROM lineitem 
    WHERE l_shipdate > DATE '1995-03-20' 
    GROUP BY l_orderkey
)
SELECT 
    l.l_orderkey, 
    l.revenue, 
    o.o_orderdate, 
    o.o_shippriority 
FROM lineitem_agg l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1995-03-20' 
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey AND c.c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' 
ORDER BY revenue DESC, o_orderdate 
LIMIT 10;

original_query: select l_orderkey, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue, o_orderdate, o_shippriority from customer, orders, lineitem where c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' and c_custkey = o_custkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_orderdate < date '1995-03-14' and l_shipdate > date '1995-03-14' group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority order by revenue desc, o_orderdate limit 10;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT c_custkey
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY'
)
SELECT l_orderkey, 
       SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue, 
       o_orderdate, 
       o_shippriority 
FROM filtered_customers
JOIN orders ON filtered_customers.c_custkey = o_custkey
JOIN lineitem ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
WHERE o_orderdate < DATE '1995-03-14'
  AND l_shipdate > DATE '1995-03-14'
GROUP BY l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority 
ORDER BY revenue DESC, o_orderdate 
LIMIT 10;

original_query: select l_orderkey, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue, o_orderdate, o_shippriority from customer, orders, lineitem where c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' and c_custkey = o_custkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_orderdate < date '1995-03-08' and l_shipdate > date '1995-03-08' group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority order by revenue desc, o_orderdate limit 10;
